aligned_functional_domains.justification: Both repositories contain identical JsonValue enum with 7 variants, custom Object implementation with inline key optimization, Number type with Grisu2-based float conversion, Short string optimization, and all From/PartialEq trait implementations. The internal module structure (value/mod.rs, implements.rs, object.rs, number.rs, short.rs) is perfectly preserved.
evidence_signatures: pub fn dump(&self) -> String -> pub fn dump(&self) -> String
pub fn insert(&mut self, key: &str, value: JsonValue) -> pub fn insert(&mut self, key: &str, value: JsonValue)
pub fn as_f64(&self) -> Option<f64> -> pub fn as_f64(&self) -> Option<f64>

aligned_functional_domains.justification: Both repositories contain identical Parser struct with raw pointer-based buffer management, the same public parse() function signature, identical Error enum with 5 variants, and the same set of parser methods (read_byte, bump, read_complex_string, read_big_number, etc.).
evidence_signatures: pub fn parse(source: &str) -> Result<JsonValue> -> pub fn parse(source: &str) -> Result<JsonValue>
fn read_complex_string<'b>(&mut self, start: usize) -> Result<&'b str> -> fn read_complex_string<'b>(&mut self, start: usize) -> Result<&'b str>
pub fn wrong_type(expected: &str) -> Self -> pub fn wrong_type(expected: &str) -> Self

aligned_functional_domains.justification: Both repositories contain identical Generator trait with the same 9 trait methods, and all four generator implementations (DumpGenerator, PrettyGenerator, WriterGenerator, PrettyWriterGenerator) with identical method signatures and behavior.
evidence_signatures: fn write_json(&mut self, json: &JsonValue) -> io::Result<()> -> fn write_json(&mut self, json: &JsonValue) -> io::Result<()>
pub fn new(spaces: u16) -> Self -> pub fn new(spaces: u16) -> Self
fn write_string(&mut self, string: &str) -> io::Result<()> -> fn write_string(&mut self, string: &str) -> io::Result<()>

aligned_functional_domains.justification: Both repositories contain identical DiyFp struct with the same 8 methods, identical Grisu2 algorithm implementation (convert, digit_gen, grisu_round), and identical print_dec module with the same unsafe write function and lookup tables.
evidence_signatures: pub fn convert(float: f64) -> (u64, i16) -> pub fn convert(float: f64) -> (u64, i16)
pub unsafe fn from_f64(d: f64) -> Self -> pub unsafe fn from_f64(d: f64) -> Self

pub unsafe fn write<W: io::Write>(wr: &mut W, positive: bool, mut n: u64, exponent: i16) -> io::Result<()> -> pub unsafe fn write<W: io::Write>(wr: &mut W, positive: bool, mut n: u64, exponent: i16) -> io::Result<()>

aligned_functional_domains.justification: Both repositories contain identical public API with the same re-exports (Error, JsonValue, Null, JsonError, JsonResult, parse), identical top-level functions (from, stringify, stringify_pretty), and identical macro exports (array!, object!, value!).
evidence_signatures: pub fn from<T>(value: T) -> JsonValue where T: Into<JsonValue> -> pub fn from<T>(value: T) -> JsonValue where T: Into<JsonValue>
pub fn stringify<T>(root: T) -> String where T: Into<JsonValue> -> pub fn stringify<T>(root: T) -> String where T: Into<JsonValue>
pub fn stringify_pretty<T>(root: T, spaces: u16) -> String where T: Into<JsonValue> -> pub fn stringify_pretty<T>(root: T, spaces: u16) -> String where T: Into<JsonValue>
